title: Chat Filter
description: A Mod that blocks Spammy [Broadcast] & [Crates] Messages from the chat with Keybind [G]
body:
📛 ChatFilter - Clean Your Chat from Server Spam
ChatFilter is a lightweight Fabric mod designed to enhance your Minecraft experience by blocking annoying automated server messages that clutter your chat — such as [Broadcast], [Crates] Created Specifically for Invaded Lands Minecraft Server

ChatFilter helps you focus on what really matters: the players and gameplay — not endless spam.

✅ Features
🧹 Blocks Annoying Server Messages
Automatically filters out messages starting with specific prefixes like [Broadcast] or [Crates].

🎛️ Toggle Filtering On/Off
Press G in-game to toggle the filter without needing to restart or reconfigure anything.

⚡ Client-side Only
Works entirely on your client — no server permissions or installation needed.

💬 Lightweight and Non-Intrusive
Doesn’t affect other features or performance, and plays nicely with other mods.

🎥 Demo Video
Watch it in action on Youtube. [Chat Filter Block [Crates] and [Broadcast] Messages](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Im0leKt_Rek)

📦 Installation
Requires Minecraft 1.21.5

Requires Fabric Loader

Requires Fabric API
